item.title: Power outages, fuel costs, Abaco shooting
item.ns0:title: Power outages, fuel costs, Abaco shooting
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, escalating power outages and load shedding leave residents across several islands frustrated as summer temperatures reach dangerous highs. We examine the mounting pressure on gas station retailers as fuel prices hover near $7 a gallon and get the Transport Minister's response to a shocking viral altercation between jitney drivers. Our team also brings you the latest on a deadly shooting in Abaco and a major $1.6 million investment in youth development for Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, a record-breaking wrap-up from the national track and field championships, and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, escalating power outages and load shedding leave residents across several islands frustrated as summer temperatures reach dangerous highs. We examine the mounting pressure on gas station retailers as fuel prices hover near $7 a gallon and get the Transport Minister's response to a shocking viral altercation between jitney drivers. Our team also brings you the latest on a deadly shooting in Abaco and a major $1.6 million investment in youth development for Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, a record-breaking wrap-up from the national track and field championships, and your complete tropical weather outlook.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, escalating power outages and load shedding leave residents across several islands frustrated as summer temperatures reach dangerous highs. We examine the mounting pressure on gas station retailers as fuel prices hover near $7 a gallon and get the Transport Minister's response to a shocking viral altercation between jitney drivers. Our team also brings you the latest on a deadly shooting in Abaco and a major $1.6 million investment in youth development for Grand Bahama. Join us for these headlines, a record-breaking wrap-up from the national track and field championships, and your complete tropical weather outlook.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
